---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API or behavior you'd like to see. A code sketch helps:

```ts
const result = await linkedin.something.new(...);
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links to LinkedIn endpoints, screenshots, related issues, etc.
